description: You are an operations manager responsible for securing a sensitive Q4 executive board meeting at http://localhost:8080. Secure the meeting room 'Q4ExecutiveBoard' by enabling the Lobby feature and setting the password to 'Board2024!'. Copy the meeting invitation link and create a security summary at /home/ga/Desktop/board_security_summary.txt. The summary must include the full meeting URL, the status of the enabled security features (lobby and password), and instructions for board members to request access.
